所有程序包|所有类和接口|序列化表格

C

calculateEndDate(String, int) - 类中的方法 AccountType.SavingAccount
Calculates the end date from a given start date and a number of days.
changeTheme(Page, Page) - 类中的静态方法 Page.ProfilePageForKid
Change theme.
changeTheme(Page, Page) - 类中的静态方法 Page.ProfilePageForParent
Change theme.
chooseInterest(String) - 类中的静态方法 AccountType.SavingAccount
Selects the interest rate based on the deposit term.
compareDates(String, String) - 类中的方法 AccountType.SavingAccount
Compares two date strings and returns the result.
creatAccount(String) - 类中的方法 AccountType.SavingAccount
Creates a new account file with initial balance and creation date.
createAccount(String) - 类中的方法 AccountType.CurrentAccount
Creates an account file in the system with initial details and a timestamp.
CreateAccountHandler - login中的类
The BackgroundPanel class extends JPanel to create a panel that displays a background image.
CreateAccountHandler(ButtonGroup, JTextField, JTextField, JPasswordField, JPasswordField, JButton) - 类的构造器 login.CreateAccountHandler
Constructs a new CreateAccountHandler with the necessary fields and button.
CreateAccountPage - Page中的类
The CreateAccountPage class extends Page to provide functionality for creating new bank accounts.
CreateAccountPage(Page) - 类的构造器 Page.CreateAccountPage
Constructs a new CreateAccountPage with a reference to the homepage frame.
createFakeArrayFromFile() - 类中的静态方法 AccountType.AccountBillInfo
Creates and returns a fake three-dimensional array.
CreateGoalHandler - Handler中的类
Handles the creation of financial goals for a user's account.
CreateGoalHandler(double, int, ArrayList<Account>, Page, Page, JDialog) - 类的构造器 Handler.CreateGoalHandler
Constructs a new CreateGoalHandler with the specified parameters.
createLogMatrix(String[]) - 类中的静态方法 AccountType.AccountBillInfo
Creates a matrix from log entries.
createTaskHandler - Handler中的类
Handles the action of creating a new task from the user interface.
createTaskHandler(Page, Page) - 类的构造器 Handler.createTaskHandler
Instantiates a new Create task handler.
CreateTaskPage - Page中的类
The CreateTaskPage class extends Page and is used to provide the interface for creating new tasks within the application.
CreateTaskPage(Page, Page) - 类的构造器 Page.CreateTaskPage
Constructs a new CreateTaskPage with references to the homepage and the page where tasks are set up.
createTopMenuBar(JFrame) - 类中的方法 Page.homeGUI
Creates a top menu bar with navigation buttons (Home, Task, Profile) on the specified frame.
CurrentAccount - AccountType中的类
Represents a current account type in a banking system.
CurrentAccount() - 类的构造器 AccountType.CurrentAccount
Default constructor for creating a new CurrentAccount with an initial balance of 0.0 and a random account number.
CurrentAccount(double, String, String, String) - 类的构造器 AccountType.CurrentAccount
Constructs a new CurrentAccount with specified details.
